history.what_changed: Added initial gitmind engine with diff reader functionality
history.why_it_likely_changed: To enable version control and metadata analysis capabilities within the project
history.impact: This feature will enhance the project's ability to track changes, understand differences, and manage metadata more effectively

history.what_changed: Refactored JSON parsing in llm.py
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve robustness and handle various data types more effectively
history.impact: Enhances the reliability of the JSON output from the code analysis tool

history.what_changed: Added 'format': 'json' to the JSON payload
history.why_it_likely_changed: To enforce valid JSON output from the model
history.impact: Ensures consistent and valid JSON output from the model

history.what_changed: Truncated feature_name to 40 characters
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure consistent naming and avoid potential issues with long strings
history.impact: May affect systems relying on consistent feature names

history.what_changed: Added issue and pull request templates along with CI/CD workflows, MkDocs docs, pytest suite, black formatting, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG, LICENSE
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve repository organization, automation, documentation, and collaboration
history.impact: Enhances repository maintainability, ensures consistent development practices, and improves communication

history.what_changed: added contents:write permission and configured git for deploy bot in the GitHub Actions workflow
history.why_it_likely_changed: to allow automated deployment of documentation changes to a repository
history.impact: enables automatic updates to the documentation site without manual intervention

history.what_changed: added a new document detailing build log and history
history.why_it_likely_changed: to provide transparent development history for troubleshooting and documentation purposes
history.impact: will help developers understand the build process and issues encountered during gitmind's development

history.what_changed: Added graceful error handling for Ollama timeout and connection errors
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve user experience by avoiding crashes when Ollama is not running or timing out
history.impact: Enhances the robustness of the system in handling external service failures

history.what_changed: Removed .gitmind tracking and tightened feature names
history.why_it_likely_changed: To clean up gitignore and improve code organization
history.impact: Simplified the repository by removing unnecessary files

history.what_changed: added script to auto-generate build log from metadata.json
history.why_it_likely_changed: to improve documentation build process and provide better visibility into build information
history.impact: enhances the automation of documentation build processes, making it easier to track build logs and identify issues

history.what_changed: Formatted the code using black in metadata.py
history.why_it_likely_changed: To maintain consistent code style across the project
history.impact: No functional change, improves readability and maintainability

history.what_changed: updated the directories checked by the Black CI check
history.why_it_likely_changed: to ensure all source files are linted for code style
history.impact: improves code quality and consistency across the project

history.what_changed: Amended the commit to include metadata.json and formatted tests with black
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure that important metadata is committed along with code changes and to maintain code quality
history.impact: Ensures that necessary metadata is included in commits and improves code formatting consistency

history.what_changed: guard post-commit hook against infinite amend loop using GITMIND_RUNNING env var
history.why_it_likely_changed: to prevent an infinite loop caused by the commit hook running itself repeatedly on each commit amendment
history.impact: prevents potential system hang due to infinite loop and ensures continuous operation of the commit process

history.what_changed: pin black to --target-version py39
history.why_it_likely_changed: to match local and CI output
history.impact: may improve code style consistency across different Python versions

history.what_changed: Pin black version in CI and add pyproject.toml for consistent formatting
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure consistent code style across the project and fix potential issues with different versions of black
history.impact: Improves code quality and consistency, making the CI more reliable

history.what_changed: cleaned metadata.json, improved build log intro, added demo recording script
history.why_it_likely_changed: to improve documentation and automation processes
history.impact: enhances user experience by providing a demo recording and improving build log visibility

history.what_changed: Added demo GIF to README.md and cleaned up build log documentation.
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve the user experience by providing a visual demonstration and to organize build logs better.
history.impact: Enhances the clarity and usefulness of the README and build log pages for users.

history.what_changed: Reindexed all commits through LLM to provide real diffs, analysis, and metadata
history.why_it_likely_changed: To enhance the accuracy and comprehensiveness of commit summaries and analyses
history.impact: Significantly improves the quality and usefulness of commit data for developers

history.what_changed: switched to qwen2.5-coder:7b model and reindexed all commits
history.why_it_likely_changed: to improve performance or compatibility with a newer language model
history.impact: potentially improves code analysis accuracy and speed

history.what_changed: updated all references from deepseek-coder to qwen2.5-coder:7b
history.why_it_likely_changed: to update the project's dependencies and use the latest version of the language model
history.impact: this change will affect how commits are analyzed by the local LLM, potentially improving or changing the analysis results
